title: IC Skill Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in SKILL.md files. Defines the metadata contract that build scripts, CI, and agent tooling rely on.

name.description: Unique skill identifier. Lowercase, hyphenated. Must match the directory name under skills/. Aligns with the Agent Skills spec (agentskills.io).

title.description: Human-readable display name for the skill.

category.description: Skill category. Must be one of the predefined categories.

description.description: One-sentence summary. Describes when an agent should load this skill and what it covers.

version.description: Semantic version (major.minor.patch). See CONTRIBUTING.md for versioning rules.

endpoints.description: Number of distinct canister methods or external API operations documented in the Implementation section.

status.description: Stability status. 'stable' = production-ready, 'beta' = API may change.

dependencies.description: Array of skill names this skill depends on. Each must match an existing skill's name field.

tags.description: Keywords for agent discovery. Lowercase, hyphenated. Used for keyword-based skill matching.
